Video.summary: Sturgeon and prawns meet wines and liqueurs in Chef Spencer Watts' kitchen as he brings seafood and booze together in delicious culinary concoctions.
Video.title: Boozy

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts dishes on delicious ways to stuff rainbow trout and oysters and how to use them to stuff in a sandwich or even an avocado parcel.
Video.title: Stuffed

Video.summary: Fish loves spice and Chef Spencer Watts loves fish so he brings the delicious world of spice to halibut and lobster along with some cooling sides.
Video.title: Spice

Video.summary: Tyrone reveals Iafa's DNA test results and helps her explore her heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet Iafa Almeida Cac

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts shares some of his favorite mackerel and mussel recipes that highlight aromatic, vibrant and fresh herbs.
Video.title: Herb

Video.summary: Morel mushrooms grow from the ashes of a forest fire and travel thousands of miles to the kitchen.
Video.title: Morels

Video.summary: Cranberries travel from a Nova Scotia farm to a Thanksgiving feast.
Video.title: Cranberries

Video.summary: Soft prawn from the waters of Vancouver travels to a beach-side grill.
Video.title: Spot Prawns

Video.summary: A look at the journey of organic asparagus from a family farm in Ontario to a backyard BBQ.
Video.title: Asparagus

Video.summary: Chef and culinary instructor Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen cooks Japanese cuisine inspired by other cultures with a pork and tofu dish, sesame chicken salad, breaded pork cutlet, and even a French crepe.
Video.title: Japanese Food Inspired By Other Cultures

Image.alt: Japanese Food Inspired By Other Cultures
Japanese Food Inspired By Other Cultures
Japanese Food Inspired By Other Cultures
Japanese Food Inspired By Other Cultures
Japanese Food Inspired By Other Cultures

Video.summary: Vanessa makes dishes centered around olive oil including two different pasta dishes.
Video.title: It's All About the Olive Oil

Image.alt: It's All About the Olive Oil
It's All About the Olive Oil
It's All About the Olive Oil
It's All About the Olive Oil
It's All About the Olive Oil

Video.summary: Italian chef and foodie Vanessa Gianfrancesco demonstrates how to make dishes delicious enough for a fine restaurant with fried zucchini blossoms, spaghetti carbonara, roast lamb, and fruit crostata.
Video.title: DIY Italian Fine Dining

Video.summary: It's all about the grill as Thai chef and cookbook author Pailin Changchitnant makes dish after dish to go on the BBQ, like grilled eggplant salad, steak with dipping sauce or in a salad, and fish in banana leaves.
Video.title: Grilled Thai Dishes

Video.summary: Michael prepares classics like margherita pizza and fried seafood.
Video.title: Campania

Video.summary: Michael makes some Apulian classics.
Video.title: Puglia

Video.summary: Vanessa Gianfrancesco prepares her favorite Chinese-inspired brunch dishes; shrimp dumplings; pork bao buns combine roast pork, delicious hoisin, fluffy steamed buns, and crunchy fresh veggies; homemade congee topped with crispy beef and scallions.
Video.title: Dim Sum Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa shares her favourite Vegan Brunch recipes.
Video.title: Vegan Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa shares mid-morning bread recipes.
Video.title: Bread for Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa creates a delicious seafood brunch menu.
Video.title: Seafood Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa creates an international menu with brunch recipes from around the world.
Video.title: Brunch Around the World

Video.summary: Vanessa creates a brunch menu inspired by the Middle East.
Video.title: Middle Eastern Brunch

Video.summary: Jasmin Ibrahim and Shahir Massoud bring their favorite spices to everyone's favorite comfort food recipes.
Video.title: Comfort + Spice

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Vietnam, Lebanon, China, and Germany.
Video.title: Vietnam, Lebanon, China, Germany

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by South Korea, jicama kimchi; Russia, roasted eggplant salad; Spain, quinoa paella; El Salvador, Salvadorian grilled iceberg lettuce wedge.
Video.title: Korea, Russia, Spain, El Salvador

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Italy, Morocco, Ethiopia, and Jamaica.
Video.title: Italy, Morocco, Ethiopia, Jamaica

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Sweden, Swedish turnips and granola; Mexico, radicchio tacos; Senegal, cashew-sweet potato maafe; Italy, bok choy fusilli.
Video.title: Sweden, Mexico, Senegal, Italy

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Indonesia's tomato nasi goreng; Greece's Greek melon salad; Syria's kidney bean hummus; Thailand's coconut curry cabbage rolls.
Video.title: Indonesia, Greece, Syria, Thailand

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by South Africa, braaied rapini; Iceland, cold Icelandic pepper soup; Bangladesh, edamame jhalmuri; Spain, Spanish broccoli tortilla.
Video.title: South Africa, Iceland, Bangladesh, Spain

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by the U.S., scalloped cassava casserole; Vietnam, pear summer rolls; Spain, hempseed romesco with leeks; India, potato biryani hash.
Video.title: USA, Vietnam, Spain, India

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by India's bhindi masala-style nopales; Belgium's Belgian plantain waffles; Italy's almond crusted portobellos; China's sichuan artichoke stir fry.
Video.title: India, Belgium, Italy, China

Video.summary: Recipes from Taste Canada award-winning cookbooks, highlighting unique food.
Video.title: Tenderheart

Video.summary: Recipes from Taste Canada award-winning cookbooks, highlighting unique food.
Video.title: The World Central Kitchen Cookbook

Video.summary: Recipes from Taste Canada award-winning cookbooks, highlighting unique food.
Video.title: Disporican

Video.summary: Recipes from Taste Canada award-winning cookbooks, highlighting unique food.
Video.title: The Cook You Want to Be
